features.name: always_ff with asynchronous reset and non-blocking assignments
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block with an asynchronous reset using 'or negedge reset_n' and non-blocking assignments in both reset and clocked branches
features.snippet:
always_ff @(posedge clk or negedge reset_n) begin
  if(~reset_n) begin
    q <= 0;
  end else begin
    q <= d;
  end
end
